title: Attestplane replay_event payload (v1)
description: Payload-only schema for the `replay_event` audit event_type — records that a deterministic re-execution of a prior chain segment was OBSERVED, with three independent match booleans (input / artifact / audit_chain) and their AND deterministic_result. ADR-0009 A.9 schema-shape re-issue (Mode A.6) of fields originally observed at `~/aios/crates/aios-sdk-evidence/src/replay.rs#L7-L21` (ReplayEvidenceDescriptor) + `~/aios/schemas/replay/replay_proof.schema.json#L1-L40` (ReplayProof). Authority-bearing fields (the execution of replay itself — lives in REDLINE C.13 `aios-replay-runner`; authority-flavoured `ProofType::LiveRuntimeInvariant` / `ProductionLive`) are explicitly NOT absorbed. Attestplane substrate NEVER re-executes the workload; it records that the boolean outcomes WERE observed by an external replay runner.
$comment: Status: ACTIVE (ADR-0009 Accepted 2026-05-17). Targets EU AI Act Art. 15 (accuracy & robustness — deterministic re-verification) + Art. 12(1) record-keeping.

replay_event_schema_version.description: Independent of chain.schema_version / anchor_schema_version / signature_schema_version / reason_code_schema_version / lease_event_schema_version / policy_event_schema_version. Bump requires ADR amendment.

replay_run_id.description: Caller-asserted identifier of the run that executed the replay (runs.mode=replay in AIOS terms). Substrate does not interpret format — opaque string. Verifiers may correlate against an external run registry.

original_run_id.description: Caller-asserted identifier of the original run being replayed. Substrate does not interpret.

snapshot_id_ref.description: Optional opaque reference to the snapshot at which the replay started. Substrate does not interpret.

input_hash_match.description: True if canonical-JSON of inputs to the replay was byte-identical to the original run's input set. Caller-asserted boolean observation; substrate does not re-canonicalize.

artifact_hash_match.description: True if all output artifact hashes from the replay matched the original run's artifact hashes. Caller-asserted boolean.

audit_chain_match.description: True if the immutable audit-event chain produced by the replay matched the original chain segment byte-for-byte. Caller-asserted boolean.

deterministic_result.description: Logical AND of (input_hash_match, artifact_hash_match, audit_chain_match). MUST equal the AND or the validator rejects (cross-check invariant).

diff_summary_hash.description: Optional SHA-256 hex of a structured divergence summary (when deterministic_result=false). Hash-only; the divergence body is NOT stored in this payload to keep size bounded and to avoid leaking raw inputs (forbidden_fields). Verifiers may correlate against an off-chain divergence-summary store.

observed_at.description: Caller-asserted RFC-3339 UTC timestamp of when the replay outcome was observed (i.e., when the comparison completed).

reason_code.description: Optional machine-readable reason code drawn from ReasonCodeV1 (ADR-0010) or caller-domain enum.

redaction_policy.$comment: Documentation block: per ADR-0009 § 1 Mode A.6 + ADR-0004 § 2 redaction, the following AIOS-originated fields MUST NOT appear here. Authority-flavoured ProofType variants (LiveRuntimeInvariant / ProductionLive) are dropped per ADR-0009 A.3 redaction.
